# Equinix

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners  
**Website:** https://www.equinix.com/

## Headline
Global colocation platform relevant to enterprise AI infrastructure decisions.

## Overview
Equinix is one of the largest and best-known colocation platforms in the market. For buyers evaluating modular versus colocation paths, Equinix represents the established colocation option: broad market presence, ecosystem depth, and strong enterprise familiarity.

## Key capabilities
- colocation footprint across major markets
- enterprise infrastructure ecosystem
- relevance for hybrid and distributed deployments

## Best fit for
- buyers comparing build vs buy decisions
- enterprises needing established colocation options
- teams prioritizing geographic reach and ecosystem access

## Considerations
A useful reference point in comparison pages because it represents the colocation alternative many buyers should consider before defaulting to modular build assumptions.
